abilities.name: Reflect Magic (Ram+Mask)
abilities.description: After succeeding against Spell/Manifested Power, attacker suffers 2/3B/5BB damage. Damage flip receives -.

abilities.name: On My Orders (Ram)
abilities.description: After succeeding, friendly Minion within 12 yards may take (1) Walk toward attacker. If Witchling, may make Close Combat attack.

abilities.name: Thalarian Doctrine
abilities.description: When casting Enchanting Spell/Manifested Power, two instances of Increased Duration Immuto added without increasing TN.

actions: (1) Runed Greatsword (Labor) | AV: 6 (14) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 3/4/6 damage. Gains + if not part of Charge. Grants + to Intimidate. Crow Drain Magic: End magical effects and heal 1 Wound per effect.
(1) Burn Them All (Sorcery) | AV: 6T (14T) | TN: 14T | Rg: z10 | Resist: Wp | Target suffers 2/3B/4B damage. Every character damaged gains Burning +1.
(1) Collier Single Action Army (Pistol) | AV: 6 (14) | Rg: z12 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. Capacity 6, Reload 2. Grants + to Intimidate.
system.notes: Trainers tasked with brainwashing Witchlings into living weapons after their personalities are burned away by Sonnia Criid.
